title: After the Japanese Derby: Victory Hashtag!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Matikanetannhauser owns all 2,400 meters!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I... did it...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I DID IIIIIT!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I won, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Matikanetannhauser?! No way! I can't believe it!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
I never would've guessed Mihono Bourbon would
lose in a million years! And Rice Shower ran so
well too...

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Look over there! It's Mihono Bourbon and Rice
Shower!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Sigh. I couldn't do it... I still haven't changed...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: That's not true.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
You've gotten much better since the Satsuki Sho.
I've been watching you and I've certainly felt your
improvement.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I'm certain you're my biggest threat at the Kikuka
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Bourbon... I... I...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'll definitely get first place next time! I'm going to
make everyone smile!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty sure I read something about that the
other day in an article online!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
I saw that too! It said Mihono Bourbon was
watching out for her. I thought they were just
exaggerating, but...

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Holy cow! I guess it was true! Now I'm really
looking forward to the Kikuka Sho all of a
sudden!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd claps just as much for the two of them
as they do for Matikanetannhauser.

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text:
Look! Mihono Bourbon and Rice Shower are
trending!

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text:
But Machitan's the one who won... Isn't that kind
of, like, disrespectful?

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text:
...I sure hope this doesn't blow up into some
drama.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Come to think about it, it did seem like there
were a lot of people clapping for Bourbon and
Rice.
choice_data_list: Don't let it get to you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no! That's not it! I was just making an
observation!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
They're both top contenders themselves. Of
course they're gonna get a lot of attention.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Besides, winning is what matters and I'm A-OK on
that front!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! Will you take a picture with me? I
wanna post it on social media!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I've always wanted to make a post with
"#DerbyWinner"!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
"The Japanese Derby is mine! I was so excited for
the race that this feels like a dream! I'm gonna
bring it in the Kikuka Sho too! (elephant emoji)"

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...What do you think, Trainer? Is that okay? You
think it needs more memes?
choice_data_list: I think it's good the way it is.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Great! Aaand... posted!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Phew, that takes care of that! There's so much to
do after you achieve your dre—

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Aghhh!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I forgot to add the hashtag!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, the Japanese Derby draws to a close
after a great showing from Matikanetannhauser.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I was just reading some comments on the post I
made after the Japanese Derby...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
"Exactly! The most important thing in a
competition is winning. I could learn something
from her!"

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
"If Tannhauser doesn't care about the spotlight,
who are we to argue?"

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
They're all like this, but... what are they talking
about? What do they mean I don't care about the
spotlight?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the Japanese Derby, there was more
attention on some of the other runners, despite
Tannhauser winning. This got some of the fans
arguing with each other.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser herself paid it no mind and
just took genuine pleasure in her win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That honest innocence ended up earning her a lot
of praise online.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like there's just one thing to do... Time to
look up myself online!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like she really doesn't have any idea
about the drama.
choice_data_list: (I guess she's just not interested. Or maybe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She never thought she would find herself at the
center of online drama.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In any case... next up is the Kikuka Sho. As
always, we're aiming to win.
